identity.name: CampusPulse
identity.description: A fusion of Ivy League prestige and Gen-Z digital fluency. Structured, authoritative layouts (Admin) meet vibrant, kinetic event discovery (Student).

rules: Headings (h1-h3) must use 'Outfit' with tight tracking (-0.02em).
Body text must use 'Inter' for maximum legibility.
Use Uppercase + Wide Tracking for labels (e.g., 'EVENT DATE', 'CATEGORY').

usage.admin_dashboard: High contrast. White backgrounds, dark indigo sidebar, subtle borders.
usage.student_dashboard: Card-heavy. Use gradients of Indigo-to-Purple for hero sections. Use 'Electric Melon' for CTAs.

grid_system.student_view: Bento Grid (Asymmetric). Hero event takes 2x2. Quick actions take 1x1.
grid_system.admin_view: Dense Data Grid. Sidebar fixed (w-64). Main content fluid.

cards.style: Clean, white cards with soft shadow-lg. 1px border-border/40.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold bg-indigo-900 hover:bg-indigo-800 text-white shadow-lg shadow-indigo-900/20
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-900

navigation.sidebar: Glassmorphism in dark mode, solid academic indigo in light mode.

charts.style: Minimal axes. Tooltips with rounded-lg and shadow-xl.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must scale slightly (scale-105) on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Strategy: Implement a toggle for 'Academic Mode' (Light) and 'Late Night Mode' (Dark). Default to Light.
Navigation: Use Role-Based Navigation. Admin gets a Sidebar. Students get a Top Navbar with a 'Mega Menu' for categories.

Dashboard Logic: The Student Dashboard must look like a 'Streaming Service' for events (Horizontal scroll rows, Hero Banner). The Admin Dashboard must look like a 'Mission Control' (Data density, Charts).
Forms: Use Shadcn Form components but style them with 'floating labels' or large comfortable inputs.
Notifications: Use 'Sonner' for toasts. Create a Notification Center dropdown in the header.
Calendar: Use 'react-day-picker' (installed) styled to match the theme.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
